title: Apply to become a children’s social care private dashboard early adopter
body: "About the private dashboard early adopter scheme The children’s social care (CSC) private dashboard early adopter scheme is part of our objective to improve how we collect, share and use CSC data to improve the outcomes for children, young people and families.   The scheme provides local authorities in England with the opportunity to work with the Department for Education to test more timely data flows in a secure private access version of the children’s social care dashboard.    The scheme will be delivered across 2 phases:     phase 1: technical testing, which will run from July 2025 to September 2025      phase 2: main scheme, which will run from October 2025 to September 2026    These dates are subject to change.  Eligibility criteria    All upper tier local authorities are eligible to apply, except any that have received a  section 114 notice in the current financial year.  How to apply   The application guide sets out details surrounding the application process and the full assessment criteria.   Read the  application guide  (PDF, 1010 KB, 42 pages) before starting an application.  Further information is available on the  data collection specification  (MS Excel Spreadsheet, 72.9 KB) and our  principles for data collection and use   (PDF, 670 KB, 4 pages).  Local authorities can apply using the  application form  (MS Word Document, 435 KB).   Email a Word copy of your completed application form to csc.dashboard@education.gov.uk by 11:59pm on 17 June 2025.  "

taxons.title: Safeguarding and social care for children
